name: SAWO Labs API
description: SAWO Labs provided passwordless authentication as a service. The API enabled developers to integrate passwordless login (via email or phone OTP) into their applications. Note: SAWO Labs appears to be defunct as of 2026; the domain sawolabs.com no longer serves its original content.
